notes.title: The mobilization
notes.text: 47 of the 127 dated documents fall in September and October 1986 — the Daniloff crisis, the decision to meet, and the two days at Höfði House.

notes.title: The Daniloff affair
notes.text: Nicholas Daniloff and Gennady Zakharov appear almost solely in the crisis weeks: arrested within days of each other in August–September 1986 and released on the eve of the summit announcement.

notes.title: The NSC turnover
notes.text: Poindexter leaves the record after November 1986, resigning over Iran-Contra; Carlucci enters it in January 1987 and Powell in March 1987.

notes.title: The START trail
notes.text: After Reykjavik the record passes to the negotiators: Kampelman and Karpov carry the Nuclear and Space Talks thread toward the treaty endgame while the principals' presence thins.
